name: Butternut Squash Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Butternut squash, cooked and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar. Beat in eggs, milk, and vanilla. Stir in squash (mixture will be thin).
2. Pour into a greased 11x7x2-inch baking dish. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until almost set.
3. Combine topping ingredients; sprinkle over casserole. Return to oven for 5-10 minutes or until bubbly.
